raw_html:
manual_seed

paddle. manual_seed ( seed: int ) → Generator [source]

Sets the seed for global default generator, which manages the random number generation.

Parameters

seed (int) – The random seed to set. It is recommend to set a large int number.

Returns

The global default generator object.

Return type

Generator

Examples

>>> import paddle
>>> gen = paddle.seed(102)

Used in the guide/tutorials¶

  • Introduction to Data Type Promotion
  • Automatic Mixed Precision Training (AMP)
